titleStmt.title: SII 25.89: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 89. (A.R. No. 89 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The details of date of the record viz., Śaka 1421, Siddhārthi, Tai 12, do not admit verification. The weekday and the nakshatra are not given.
The king is described as the Dharmarāya and as the son of Narasiṁharāya.

This incomplete record refers to a dharma śāsana issued by Tipparasar to the mūlaparusha-mahājanas of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, exempting the taxes like araśu-kaṭṭu, pāḍikāval, kīḻvārappachchai, viniyōgam, echchōṟu, etc on the mānya-kshētra which were being enjoyed by them already and for the enjoyment of the same as sarvvamāṇya.

The present epigraph seems to furnish the last date for Tipparasa, the agent of the king as we hear from the inscriptions from Pirāṉmalai in Tiruppatur Taluk that some gifts were made for his merit. These two records of Immaḍi Narasiṁha are dated Śaka 1422, Raudri, a year later than the date of our record. Does it indicate that Tipparasa died between the date of the record under study and that of the above two epigraphs? (See A.R.Ep., 1903, Nos. 139 and 151).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran metinimicura
kaṇṭan kaṭṭāṟicāḷuvanRead arirāyavibhāṭan harihararāyavibhāṭan bhāṣaikku tappu
varāyarakaṇṭan kaṇṭaṉāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭaṉāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūrvvada
kṣiṇapaścimottaracatussamudrādhipati narasiṅharāya śrīmat kumāradharmma
rā(ā)yarāna Immaṭinarasiṁha mahārāyar prathvīrājyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam
1000 4 100 2 10 1-n mel cellāniṉṟa sidhārtthi varuṣam taiø 10 2 nāḷ śrīmatu
tipparasar keraḷa ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr mūlaparuṣa
mahājaṉaṅkaḷukku namaskāra pūrvvam Āka dharmmaśāsanapramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭu
ttapaṭi . taṅkaḷukku pūrvvamāka Anubhavittu varukiṟa mānnyakṣetraṅkaḷukku
Aracu kaṭṭuppāṭikāval kiḻvārappaccai viniyogam Ecco
ṟu taṅkaḷ Āḷ Aṭiyār Iṟai Ūḻiyaṅkaḷukkuṅ kaḻittu sarvvamānyamāka
Anubhavittuk koḷḷumpaṭikku kaṟpittu viṭṭom . Immariyāti
yile taṅkaḷ kṣetraṅkaḷukku Ellām Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟai Ū
ḻiyaṅkaḷuṅ kaḻittu sarvvamānnyamāka Ācandrārkka [kṣiti] sthāyiThe rest is lost.
Digital edition of SII 25.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
